features.title: One Image Unlocks
features.subtitle: From component identification to market analysis — our AI transforms any product image into actionable trade intelligence.

items.imageIntelDesc: Upload any product image and let AI extract components, specs, suppliers, and market data instantly.
items.componentDetectionDesc: Automatically identify materials, parts, and manufacturing requirements from product photos.
items.supplierMatchingDesc: AI matches your product to verified suppliers worldwide based on image analysis.
items.bomGenerationDesc: Generate complete Bill of Materials with cost estimates from a single product image.
items.marketIntelDesc: Analyze competitors, market pricing, and demand trends for any product you photograph.
items.pricingStrategyDesc: Get AI-recommended pricing with margin scenarios based on real market data.
items.multiModeDesc: Same image, different insights. Switch between Buyer, Producer, and Seller views.
items.contentGenDesc: Auto-generate product descriptions, social posts, and marketing copy from your analysis.

howItWorks.title: Image to
howItWorks.subtitle: One image unlocks everything you need — suppliers, costs, components, market data, and more. No forms, no catalogs, just snap and go.

steps.step1Desc: Simply drop a product image — a photo from your phone, a supplier catalog, or any product you want to analyze.
steps.step2Desc: Our AI instantly identifies components, materials, costs, suppliers, and market data from your image.
steps.step3Desc: Choose your goal: Find suppliers (Buyer), generate BOM (Producer), or analyze market (Seller).
steps.step4Desc: Request quotes, source components, or launch products — all from a single image upload.

roleCards.title: Built for Every Side of
roleCards.subtitle: Whether you're sourcing products, manufacturing goods, or selling to businesses, we have the tools you need to succeed.

buyer.title: For Buyers
buyer.subtitle: Source products globally
buyer.description: Find verified suppliers, compare quotes, and manage orders from manufacturers worldwide. Our AI helps you discover the perfect match for your requirements.

producer.title: For Producers
producer.subtitle: Manage production & pricing
producer.description: Streamline your production workflow, set competitive pricing, and connect directly with global buyers looking for your products.

seller.title: For Sellers
seller.subtitle: Expand your reach
seller.description: List your products on our global marketplace, receive qualified leads, and grow your B2B sales with powerful analytics.

testimonials.title: Trusted by
testimonials.subtitle: See how businesses around the world are transforming their trade operations with our platform.

items.quote1: TradePlatform cut our supplier discovery time by 70%. The AI matching is incredibly accurate and the verified supplier network gives us confidence in every order.
items.quote2: As a manufacturer, getting direct access to qualified buyers has transformed our business. We've increased our export volume by 3x in just 6 months.
items.quote3: The RFQ system is brilliant. I can compare quotes from 10+ suppliers in minutes instead of spending weeks on emails and calls.

cta.subtitle: No complex forms. No product catalogs. Just upload an image and let AI do the rest — suppliers, costs, market data, all in seconds.
cta.trustText: No signup required • Instant results • 100% free to try

footer.tagline: AI-powered B2B trade platform connecting buyers, producers, and sellers worldwide.

dfmReview.std3: Standardize gasket profile to industry standard
dfmReview.std5: Use standard ABS grade instead of custom blend

pricingPage.heroTitle: AI That Works While You Sleep
pricingPage.heroSubtitle: Simple, transparent pricing for powerful AI-driven B2B intelligence.
pricingPage.heroNote: All plans include our 24/7 AI agents that never stop working for you.
pricingPage.starterDesc: Perfect for individuals and small teams getting started
pricingPage.professionalDesc: For growing businesses that need more power
pricingPage.enterpriseDesc: For large organizations with custom requirements
pricingPage.aiAgentsDesc: Our AI works around the clock, monitoring markets and finding opportunities while you sleep.
pricingPage.enterpriseSecurityDesc: Bank-level encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and GDPR-ready data protection on all plans.
pricingPage.worldClassSupportDesc: Expert support team ready to help you succeed, with priority response for paid plans.
pricingPage.faqSubtitle: Have questions? We've got answers. If you can't find what you're looking for, feel free to contact our support team.
pricingPage.faq1q: What does 'AI that never sleeps' mean?
pricingPage.faq1a: Our AI agents work 24/7 to monitor markets, track competitor prices, analyze supplier changes, and alert you to opportunities—even while you're asleep.
pricingPage.faq2a: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, changes take effect at the next billing cycle.
pricingPage.faq3a: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required to start. You'll have full access to all features during the trial period.
pricingPage.faq4q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricingPage.faq4a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for Enterprise plans. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
pricingPage.faq5q: How does the AI analysis work?
pricingPage.faq5a: Simply upload a product image, and our AI will identify the product, find matching suppliers, compare prices, suggest alternatives, and provide market insights—all in seconds.
pricingPage.faq6a: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with our service for any reason, contact our support team for a full refund.
pricingPage.ctaSubtitle: No credit card required. Full access to all features. Cancel anytime.

buyersPage.heroSubtitle: Upload a product image and let our AI discover the best suppliers, compare prices, and handle negotiations—all automatically, 24/7.
buyersPage.aiSubtitle: Our AI agents work around the clock, across every timezone, ensuring you never miss an opportunity or waste time on manual research.
buyersPage.ai1Desc: Our AI agents continuously monitor supplier prices, track shipments, and alert you to opportunities 24/7.
buyersPage.ai2Desc: Get detailed product specifications, market pricing, and supplier recommendations in seconds, not hours.
buyersPage.ai3Desc: AI monitors price changes across thousands of suppliers, alerting you when prices drop.
buyersPage.ai4Desc: Analyze suppliers from China, India, Vietnam, Europe, and North America simultaneously.
buyersPage.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Source Smarter
buyersPage.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools designed to streamline your procurement process from discovery to delivery.
buyersPage.feat1Desc: Upload any product image and instantly discover matching suppliers worldwide with pricing and MOQ details.
buyersPage.feat2Desc: Find verified suppliers across 50+ countries with real-time availability and quality ratings.
buyersPage.feat3Desc: Compare prices from multiple suppliers at once. Get substitute product recommendations for better deals.
buyersPage.feat4Desc: Generate and send professional RFQs to multiple suppliers with a single click.
buyersPage.feat5Desc: Manage all supplier conversations in one place with real-time translation support.
buyersPage.feat6Desc: Access our vetted network of manufacturers with quality certifications and trade assurance.
buyersPage.whySubtitle: Join thousands of procurement professionals who've transformed their sourcing operations with AI-powered automation.
buyersPage.ctaSubtitle: Join 10,000+ buyers who source smarter with AI. Start your free trial today.

sellersPage.heroSubtitle: Let AI monitor your market, track competitors, and optimize pricing 24/7. Close more deals while your competition catches up.
sellersPage.aiTitle: Your AI Sales Team That Never Sleeps
sellersPage.aiSubtitle: While competitors rely on manual research, your AI agents work 24/7 to find opportunities and optimize your market position.
sellersPage.ai1Desc: AI tracks competitor prices, market trends, and buyer behavior around the clock.
sellersPage.ai2Desc: Get detailed competitor analysis in seconds—pricing, products, strengths, and weaknesses.
sellersPage.ai3Desc: Automated alerts when buyers show interest or competitors change strategies.
sellersPage.ai4Desc: AI forecasts demand trends and optimal pricing windows for maximum profit.
sellersPage.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Sell Smarter
sellersPage.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools to understand your market, outprice competitors, and close more deals.
sellersPage.feat1Desc: Get real-time insights on market trends, demand patterns, and competitive positioning.
sellersPage.feat2Desc: Monitor competitor pricing, products, and strategies with automated AI analysis.
sellersPage.feat3Desc: AI-optimized pricing recommendations based on market conditions and competition.
sellersPage.feat4Desc: Identify high-intent buyers and optimize your outreach for maximum conversion.
sellersPage.feat5Desc: Launch and manage marketing campaigns with AI-driven targeting and optimization.
sellersPage.feat6Desc: Expand into new markets with localized content and multi-currency support.
sellersPage.whySubtitle: Join thousands of sellers who've increased revenue and market share with AI-powered competitive intelligence.
sellersPage.ctaSubtitle: Join 5,000+ sellers who've boosted revenue with AI-powered intelligence. Start free today.

producersPage.heroSubtitle: Transform product images into complete BOMs instantly. Let AI handle cost estimation, component sourcing, and feasibility analysis while you focus on innovation.
producersPage.aiSubtitle: While your team sleeps, AI continuously optimizes your BOMs, tracks component prices, and identifies supply chain risks.
producersPage.ai1Desc: Upload a product photo and get a complete Bill of Materials in seconds, not days.
producersPage.ai2Desc: AI tracks component prices globally and alerts you to savings opportunities.
producersPage.ai3Desc: AI forecasts supply chain delays and suggests alternative sources proactively.
producersPage.ai4Desc: Continuous optimization of your BOM for cost, quality, and availability.
producersPage.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Manufacture Smarter
producersPage.featuresSubtitle: From concept to production—AI tools that streamline every step of your manufacturing process.
producersPage.feat1Desc: Upload product images and get instant Bill of Materials with component costs and sourcing options.
producersPage.feat2Desc: Real-time cost calculations with material, labor, and overhead breakdowns.
producersPage.feat3Desc: Find the best suppliers for each component with price comparisons across markets.
producersPage.feat4Desc: AI-powered feasibility studies for new products with risk assessment and timelines.
producersPage.feat5Desc: Optimize your supply chain with multi-source strategies and lead time predictions.
producersPage.feat6Desc: Strategic GTM recommendations based on market demand and competitive landscape.
producersPage.whySubtitle: Join leading manufacturers who've transformed their product development with AI-powered BOM management and cost optimization.
producersPage.ctaSubtitle: Join innovative manufacturers using AI to cut costs and accelerate time-to-market.
